name: creator-forge
description: End-to-end YouTube creator suite — research → script → storyboard → AI image/video gen (Grok+Veo3) → final product. Fusion of autogrok-veo3 (Electron base) + tube-atlas-oss (research toolkit).

scripts.install:all: cd desktop && npm install && cd .. && pip install -r research/requirements.txt
scripts.lint:js: cd desktop && npm run lint || true
scripts.test: npm run lint:py && npm run test:py
